input.instructions: Let k(n) denote the Hamming weight of the integer 2023n, where n is a positive integer. Find min {k(n) : n in Z, n > 0}.

Question:
Let k(n) denote the Hamming weight of the integer 2023n, where n is a positive integer. Find min {k(n) : n in Z, n > 0}.
